I would like information, tips, and offers about Microsoft Store and other Microsoft products and services. Privacy statement .

• • • • • • , you’re getting easy access to exclusive business discounts with your work account.

Support for your small business

Get the resources, help, and support you need to keep your business moving forward.

Support for your small business

Get the resources, help, and support you need to keep your business moving forward.

Expert advice

Our product experts are here to help you find the right solutions for your business needs. We’re available Monday to Friday from 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time.
Call us at 1 800-642-7676

Product support

Get the most out of your Microsoft products with support and learning resources.
Surface for Business support Microsoft 365 support

Skip Empower your business with comprehensive device support solutions.

Protect your devices, extend your coverage

Work worry-free with extended protection and support for all your business devices
Learn about protection plans

Business Financing

Enjoy low monthly payments with multiple business financing options.
Get started

Device lifecycle management

Minimize your IT time and resources and get help with deployment, device trade-in, and more
Learn more about our services
End of Empower your business with comprehensive device support solutions. section

Access to resources

Trade in used devices for cash

Convert your used laptops, desktops, and other devices to cash.¹ Microsoft trade-ins are powered by Teladvance. For trade-ins of 20 or more, Teladvance offers customized shipping and handling.
Get a trade-in value

The latest resources for your small business

Find tools, guides, and expert tips to help you start, manage, and grow your business, whatever its size.
Explore small business resources

Frequently asked questions

|

  • Microsoft Security for small business provides cost-effective solutions against security breaches. With Microsoft 365 for Business, you can explore options for security plans to keep you and your employees' data secure, or get enterprise-grade security with Microsoft 365 Business Premium.

  • Microsoft Defender for Business works to protect your devices against common ransomware attacks. Each user can get up to five devices secured with next-level security for $3 per month with the standalone Defender for Business plan.

  • Microsoft resources cover every aspect of a small business owner's needs. Visit the Small Business Solutions and the Small Business Help & Learning Hub to find products, tools, trainings, and other helpful advice to help manage your business. You can also find marketing resources for small businesses from Microsoft Advertising to help potential customers find your business faster.

  • Yes—our product experts are available to walk you through our different small business resources. Give us a call at 1 800-642-7676, or visit small business learning resources to find help and tutorials.

  • To purchase Surface devices, accessories, and Microsoft 365 Business subscriptions at exclusive business pricing through the Microsoft Store for Business you will need:

    • A work account or business email address from your organization.
    • A valid payment method.
    • A shipping address in the United States (for hardware purchases).


    To get started visit Small Business Solutions.

    It only takes a moment to create a work account. If you already have one, sign in to your work account.

    Enter your work email address and complete your organization's sign-in process. Once signed in, you will be able to shop eligible products at exclusive business pricing.

    If you don't have a work account, and prefer to purchase with a personal account or as a guest you can continue shopping through our normal experience where both personal and business products are available for purchase at the Microsoft Store.

  • A work account allows you to manage your business purchases separately from your personal items and lets you access exclusive business pricing at the Microsoft Store. It's the same account you use for Microsoft 365, Teams, or Outlook at work.

    It only takes a moment to create a work account. If you already have one, sign in to your work account.

  • A work account is free and signing up requires just your email, a US-based address, and to put a credit card on file. Sign up for a free work account.

  • An MSA (Microsoft Services Account key) is a personal Microsoft account. Work accounts are for business customers who have signed up for our small business experience.

  • You can find the status of your order, see tracking details, and other order details through your order history page. You can find the order status page a few ways based on how you purchased with Microsoft:

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account, go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup to view, track, cancel, or return your order.

  • Microsoft Store (including business purchases) lets you return most physical products within 60 days from the day you receive them, as long as they’re in like-new condition, in the original packaging, with all parts and documentation included. Some products (for example Surface Hub, HoloLens, Windows Dev Kit) are excluded or have different rules.

    Start a return from your order history; if an item is eligible, you’ll see a “Request a return” button.

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account, go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases and manage your order.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases and manage your order.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup to view, track, cancel, or return your order.


    You can print a prepaid shipping label and send the item back at no shipping cost to you.

    Once received and verified, refunds are usually processed to your original payment method within 3–5 business days.

  • You can try to cancel a Microsoft Store order through your order history page, as long as it hasn’t already shipped or entered the final processing stage.  If the order is still eligible, you’ll see an option like Cancel item or Cancel order, select it and follow the prompts.

    If you don’t see a cancel option, the order likely can’t be canceled. In this case, you can let it deliver and then start a return instead via the same order history page.

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account , go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used to purchase.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used to purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup.

  • For business purchases, tax invoices are usually available either in your Microsoft Store business order history or in the Microsoft 365 admin center, depending on where/what you bought. Make sure you are signed in with the same account you used to make the purchases.

    For Microsoft 365 or other subscription billing, use the admin center:

    1. Sign in to the Microsoft 365 admin center at admin.microsoft.com.
    2. Go to Billing > Bills & payments to view and download tax invoices for your organization. 


    For Store hardware/one‑time purchases:

    1. Go to Business order history: View your business order history and sign in with the same work account you used to purchase.
    2. Open the relevant order; if a tax invoice is available, you’ll see an option to View invoice or Download invoice/receipt as a PDF.

Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
Learn more

Do more and save with your free work account​

Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
Learn more

Fast shipping and free returns

Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
Some exclusions apply.*
See shipping details Learn about returns

60-day price protection

Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment.
﻿﻿﻿﻿Exclusions apply.*
Learn more about price protection

Work worry-free with extended coverage

Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.
Learn about protection plans
[1] Available only through the Microsoft online store in the United States (including Puerto Rico). Offer valid for reimbursements after trade in of qualifying devices (PC, laptop, mobile phone, tablet, video game console). To be eligible for trade in, you must own the qualifying device, device must power on, battery must hold charge and not be required to be plugged in to operate, and be in fully functional, working condition without broken/missing components, cracked display/housing, liquid damage, modification(s) or have device warranty seal broken. Device cannot be password protected, and must include original chargers/accessories, and must contain hard drive. Customer must mail in the qualifying trade-in device to be eligible for the reimbursements. All trade-ins are final. Cannot be transferred or otherwise redeemed for cash or gift cards, or credit towards other devices or products. May not be combined with other offers. Price discount does not include taxes, shipping, or other fees. Void where prohibited or restricted by law. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time. Other exclusions and limits may apply.

*See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on microsoft.com website only.

Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

Manage your orders

Open your purchase history to check on upcoming shipments and handle follow‑up tasks.

Here you can:

  • Track your packages
  • Request a return
Go to Order history

Manage invoices and accounts

Manage billing and update your account details in Microsoft Admin Center.

Here you can:

  • Download invoices for tax records
  • Access billing support
Open the Microsoft Admin Center

Security and user access

Protect your most important asset, your business data, by managing user permissions, network settings, and multi-factor authentication (MFA).
Manage your security settings

Downloads

Install, activate, and configure your Microsoft 365 or Office apps for your business. Use your product keys and manage your apps in one place.
Install and activate your apps

Frequently asked questions

|

  • Microsoft Security for small business provides cost-effective solutions against security breaches. With Microsoft 365 for Business, you can explore options for security plans to keep you and your employees' data secure, or get enterprise-grade security with Microsoft 365 Business Premium.

  • Microsoft Defender for Business works to protect your devices against common ransomware attacks. Each user can get up to five devices secured with next-level security for $3 per month with the standalone Defender for Business plan.

  • Microsoft resources cover every aspect of a small business owner's needs. Visit the Small Business Solutions and the Small Business Help & Learning Hub to find products, tools, trainings, and other helpful advice to help manage your business. You can also find marketing resources for small businesses from Microsoft Advertising to help potential customers find your business faster.

  • Yes—our product experts are available to walk you through our different small business resources. Give us a call at 1 800-642-7676, or visit small business learning resources to find help and tutorials.

  • Yes. You can contact Microsoft Business Support by phone.
    Call 1-800-642-7676 to speak with a Microsoft representative.

  • The Microsoft Business Support phone number is 1-800-642-7676.

  • To purchase Surface devices, accessories, and Microsoft 365 Business subscriptions at exclusive business pricing through the Microsoft Store for Business you will need:

    • A work account or business email address from your organization.
    • A valid payment method.
    • A shipping address in the United States (for hardware purchases).


    To get started visit Small Business Solutions. 

    It only takes a moment to create a work account. If you already have one, sign in to your work account.

    Enter your work email address and complete your organization's sign-in process. Once signed in, you will be able to shop eligible products at exclusive business pricing. 

    If you don't have a work account, and prefer to purchase with a personal account or as a guest you can continue shopping through our normal experience where both personal and business products are available for purchase at the Microsoft Store.

  • A work account allows you to manage your business purchases separately from your personal items and lets you access exclusive business pricing at the Microsoft Store. It's the same account you use for Microsoft 365, Teams, or Outlook at work. 

    It only takes a moment to create a work account. If you already have one, sign in to your work account.

  • A work account is free and signing up requires just your email, a US-based address, and to put a credit card on file. Sign up for a free work account.

  • An MSA (Microsoft Services Account key) is a personal Microsoft account. Work accounts are for business customers who have signed up for our small business experience.

  • You can find the status of your order, see tracking details, and other order details through your order history page. You can find the order status page a few ways based on how you purchased with Microsoft: 

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account, go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup to view, track, cancel, or return your order.

  • Microsoft Store (including business purchases) lets you return most physical products within 60 days from the day you receive them, as long as they’re in like-new condition, in the original packaging, with all parts and documentation included. Some products (for example Surface Hub, HoloLens, Windows Dev Kit) are excluded or have different rules.  

    Start a return from your order history; if an item is eligible, you’ll see a “Request a return” button.

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account, go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases and manage your order.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used at the time of purchase to see your past purchases and manage your order.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup to view, track, cancel, or return your order.


    You can print a prepaid shipping label and send the item back at no shipping cost to you.

    Once received and verified, refunds are usually processed to your original payment method within 3–5 business days.  

  • You can try to cancel a Microsoft Store order through your order history page, as long as it hasn’t already shipped or entered the final processing stage.  If the order is still eligible, you’ll see an option like Cancel item or Cancel order, select it and follow the prompts.  

    If you don’t see a cancel option, the order likely can’t be canceled. In this case, you can let it deliver and then start a return instead via the same order history page. 

    • If you purchased while signed into a work account, go to your Microsoft Store for Business Order History page and login with the same work account used to purchase.
    • If you purchased while signed in with your personal account, go to Microsoft Account Order History page and login with the same personal account used to purchase to see your past purchases.
    • If you checked out as a guest (your order number starts with “G”), use the Guest Order Lookup.

  • For business purchases, tax invoices are usually available either in your Microsoft Store business order history or in the Microsoft 365 admin center, depending on where/what you bought. Make sure you are signed in with the same account you used to make the purchases.

    For Microsoft 365 or other subscription billing, use the admin center: 

    1. Sign in to the Microsoft 365 admin center at admin.microsoft.com.
    2. Go to Billing > Bills & payments to view and download tax invoices for your organization.


    For Store hardware/one‑time purchases:

    1. Go to Business order history: View your business order history and sign in with the same work account you used to purchase.
    2. Open the relevant order; if a tax invoice is available, you’ll see an option to View invoice or Download invoice/receipt as a PDF.

Why shop at Microsoft Store for your business

Consider us your go-to specialists for Microsoft products and services. Whether you’re a company of three or 300, our product experts can help you find the right Microsoft devices, software, and resources to meet your goals and grow your business.
Learn more

Do more and save with your free work account​

Get easy access to exclusive business discounts and simplified account management with a shopping experience built for business.​
Manage your account

Fast shipping and free returns​

Enjoy free 2-3 day shipping with no minimum purchase required. Plus, get free 60-day returns on almost any physical product.
﻿﻿﻿﻿Some exclusions apply.
See shipping details Learn about returns

60-day price protection​

Buy now, enjoy price protection for 60 days from your delivery date. If we drop the price of a select physical product, contact us and we’ll honor a one-time price adjustment. Exclusions apply.
Learn about price protection

Work worry-free with extended coverage​

Accidents happen but business must go on. Avoid unplanned setbacks and expenses, with up to 4 years coverage when you purchase one of our Microsoft protection plans.​
Learn about protection plans

Returns: Available with eligible physical products purchased from Microsoft Store online and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets. Return process must be started within 60 days after customer receives the product. Limit 5 product returns per eligible customer purchase. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally X, ROG Xbox Ally, Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

Applicable return policy applies. For purchases made at Microsoft Store, see applicable Microsoft Terms of Sale for more information. For purchases made at a Microsoft Experience Center, see receipt for more information. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.

Microsoft Store Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying physical consumer products and Surface for Business devices made at Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Price adjustments for Surface for Business devices can be made via credit card for purchases made on icrosoft.com website only.​

Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment: Valid on purchases of qualifying new consumer physical products from Microsoft Store and Microsoft Experience Centers in select markets for 60 days from the date product is received. Excludes ROG Xbox Ally, ROG Xbox Ally X, Surface for Business devices and accessories, and refurbished products. An Eligible Retailer Price Adjustment cannot be requested at time of purchase. Microsoft reserves the right to verify an eligible retailer’s advertised price and availability of the product. The product sold by the eligible retailer must be identical to the product sold by Microsoft and must be in stock for purchase at the eligible retailer at the reduced price. Exclusions apply. ​

Both price adjustments: Price adjustment must be requested within 60 days after the customer receives the product and cannot be completed at time of purchase. Customer is eligible only if the product is in stock for purchase at Microsoft Store or a Microsoft Experience Center. Customer must contact Microsoft to request the adjustment. For purchases from Microsoft Store, contact Microsoft Store Sales and Support and provide any information requested by a representative. For purchases from a Microsoft Experience Center, you must return to the location with your receipt. Limit 1 price adjustment per product. Excludes Surface Hub, HoloLens, and Windows DevKit.

See Microsoft Store Price Protection for full terms and full list of eligible retailers. Microsoft reserves the right to modify or discontinue offers at any time.
